'''âw-n-sh''' ('''kawanash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machiavellize|machiavellize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machiavellize|machiavellize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kawanash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwanash|thiwanash]] || [[word:jiwanash|jiwanash]] || [[word:shiwanash|shiwanash]] || [[word:kiwanash|kiwanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwanash|thuthuwanash]] || [[word:jujuwanash|jujuwanash]] || [[word:shushuwanash|shushuwanash]] || [[word:kukuwanash|kukuwanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwanash|thuwanash]] || [[word:juwanash|juwanash]] || [[word:shuwanash|shuwanash]] || [[word:kuwanash|kuwanash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwanash|thuwanash]] || [[word:juwanash|juwanash]] || [[word:shuwanash|shuwanash]] || [[word:kuwanash|kuwanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewanash|thewanash]] || [[word:jewanash|jewanash]] || [[word:shewanash|shewanash]] || [[word:kewanash|kewanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowanash|thothowanash]] || [[word:jojowanash|jojowanash]] || [[word:shoshowanash|shoshowanash]] || [[word:kokowanash|kokowanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowanash|thowanash]] || [[word:jowanash|jowanash]] || [[word:showanash|showanash]] || [[word:kowanash|kowanash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowanash|thowanash]] || [[word:jowanash|jowanash]] || [[word:showanash|showanash]] || [[word:kowanash|kowanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwanash|thĂŠwanash]] || [[word:jĂŠwanash|jĂŠwanash]] || [[word:shĂŠwanash|shĂŠwanash]] || [[word:kĂŠwanash|kĂŠwanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawanash|thathawanash]] || [[word:jajawanash|jajawanash]] || [[word:shashawanash|shashawanash]] || [[word:kakawanash|kakawanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawanash|thawanash]] || [[word:jawanash|jawanash]] || [[word:shawanash|shawanash]] || [[word:kawanash|kawanash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawanash|thawanash]] || [[word:jawanash|jawanash]] || [[word:shawanash|shawanash]] || [[word:kawanash|kawanash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawanash|shawanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawanash|goshawanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawanash|gokishawanash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawanashnĂŒ|shawanashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawanashnknĂŒ|goshawanashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanashnĂŒ|gokishawanashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawanashĂ«|shawanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawanashnkshĂ«|goshawanashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawanashĂ«|gokishawanashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanashro|shawanashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanashnkro|goshawanashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanashro|gokishawanashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanashmu|shawanashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanashnkmu|goshawanashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanashmu|gokishawanashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawanasher|shawanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawanashnksher|goshawanashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawanasher|gokishawanasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawanashng|shawanashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawanashnkng|goshawanashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawanashng|gokishawanashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawanashya|shawanashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawanashnkya|goshawanashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawanashya|gokishawanashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawanashyam|shawanashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawanashnkyam|goshawanashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawanashyam|gokishawanashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanashnĂŒshĂ«|shawanashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawanashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawanashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanashnĂŒro|shawanashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanashnknĂŒro|goshawanashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanashnĂŒro|gokishawanashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanashnĂŒmu|shawanashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanashnknĂŒmu|goshawanashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanashnĂŒmu|gokishawanashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanashĂ«nĂŒ|shawanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawanashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawanashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanashĂ«ro|shawanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanashnkshĂ«ro|goshawanashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanashĂ«ro|gokishawanashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanashĂ«mu|shawanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanashnkshĂ«mu|goshawanashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanashĂ«mu|gokishawanashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanashronĂŒ|shawanashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanashnkronĂŒ|goshawanashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanashronĂŒ|gokishawanashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanashroshĂ«|shawanashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanashnkroshĂ«|goshawanashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanashroshĂ«|gokishawanashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawanashromu|shawanashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawanashnkromu|goshawanashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawanashromu|gokishawanashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawanashmunĂŒ|shawanashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawanashnkmunĂŒ|goshawanashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawanashmunĂŒ|gokishawanashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawanashmushĂ«|shawanashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawanashnkmushĂ«|goshawanashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawanashmushĂ«|gokishawanashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawanashmuro|shawanashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawanashnkmuro|goshawanashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawanashmuro|gokishawanashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
